prompt: For each business function, calculate: total subscription revenue in the last 6 months, number of unique users who subscribed to at least one module from that function, and the single highest-revenue module. Present the results sorted by revenue descending.
output:
Business Function | Total Revenue (6mo) | Unique Users | Highest-Revenue Module
Research & Development | $3,179,000 | 80 | Trial Success Probability Model ($496,000)
Supply Chain | $2,412,500 | 87 | Demand Forecast Engine ($350,000)
Sales & Marketing | $2,378,500 | 77 | Market Share Monitor ($418,000)
HR & People | $2,251,000 | 83 | Talent Retention Predictor ($374,000)
Finance | $2,041,000 | 78 | Revenue Forecast Model ($324,000)
